height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="67" value="$$A_{u}=\frac{u_{o}}{u_{i}}|_{R_L}=\frac{R_{L}}{R_{L}+R_{o}}\cdot A_{uo}$$" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=18;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="570" width="630" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="68" value="$$A_{us}=\frac{u_{o}}{u_{s}}=\frac{u_{o}}{u_{i}}\cdot\frac{u_{i}}{u_{s}}=A_{u}\cdot\frac{R_{i}}{R_{i}+R_{s}}$$" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=18;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="640" width="880" <mxCell id="65" value="$$A_{uo}=\frac{u_{o}}{u_{i}}|_{R_{L}=\infty}$$" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=18;" parent="72" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry width="390" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="69" value="O表示输出端开环（负载处断路）；<span style="font-weight: normal;">此时受控源电压等于输出电压，所以为</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontStyle=1;fontSize=16;" parent="72" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="290" y="5" width="540" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73" value="放大倍数" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="74" value="输入电压与源电压关系" <mxPoint x="720" y="562.86" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="790" y="563" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="77" value="$$A_{u}&lt;A_{uo}$$"
